CONTINUED FROM ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR ON FEB-06-2025, TO ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR ON FEB-05-2026, AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 304 PER REQUEST OF COUNSEL. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED DUE TO A FEDERAL STAY IN BANKRUPTCY COURT. COUNSEL IS TO ADVISE THE COURT OF ANY MOVEMENT AS TO INGERSOLL-RAND COMPANY. DISCUSSIONS ARE HELD AS TO 524G AND THE TEXAS TWO-STEP CONTROVERSY. MS. LETSCH STATES THAT THEY ARE FIGHTING FOR A RETURN OF THESE MATTERS TO THE TORT SYSTEM, SO THESE CASES ARE LEFT ON THE COURT'S CALENDAR. MS. CHU STATES IF THEY DISMISS THAT THERE ARE CONCERNS AS TO WHETHER THEY WILL BE ABLE TO COME BACK AND THAT THERE WILL BE A GREAT PREJUDICE TO THEIR CLIENTS. THE COURT STATES THAT GOING FORWARD IT WOULD LIKE PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT ONE LETTER TO THE COURT AT LEAST EVERY SIX MONTHS. THE LETTER IS TO STATE IF A PLAN HAS BEEN PROPOSED, IS TO PROVIDE WHAT THE TIMING OF THE PLAN WILL BE, AND IS TO INCLUDE AN UPDATE ON THE CURRENT STATUS OF THE BANKRUPTCY. KIMBERLY CHU, ESQ., AND BRYN LETSCH, ESQ., OF BRAYTON PURCELL APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA ZOOM. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: J. ALAMEDA, NOT REPORTED. (304)

ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2020 Continued To Feb-04-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503

Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Western Pipe Company (Fka Western Pipe And Steel Company Of California)
Off Calendar Jul-16-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Western Pipe Company, fka Western Pipe & Steel Company of California.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Geoff Sloniker, Esq. appeared via CourtCall with plaintiff Linda Guesman, as Successor-in-Interest to, and as Wrongful Death Heir of, Jon Lee Studer, Sr., Deceased, and also with plaintff Mark Studer as Wrongful Death Heir of Jon Lee Studer, Sr., Deceased.
Both Ms. Guesman and Mr. Studer were placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Western Pipe Company, fka Western Pipe & Steel Company of California.
Plaintiffs' for Survival/Wrongful Death was filed on September 11, 2018.
Plaintiffs' Summons, Complaint and Statement of Damages were personally served on defendant Complaint for Personal Injury-Asbestos was filed on August 16, 2017.
Summons, Complaint and Statement of Damages were personally served on defendant Western Pipe Company, fka Western Pipe & Steel Company of California, through Lorraine Polster, Deputy Secretary of State for the State of California on May 6, 2019.
Default as to defendant Western Pipe Company, fka Western Pipe & Steel Company of California, was entered on July 10, 2019.
Statement of Damages for each plaintiff was filed with the Clerk's Office on July 10, 2019.
DOES 3 through 800 were dismissed on June 29, 2020.

Plaintiffs submit the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Declaration of Linda Guesman signed July 7, 2018...........................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Declaration of Mark Studer signed September 20, 2018.......................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiffs Linda Guesman, as Successor-in-Interest to, and as Wrongful Death Heir of, Jon Lee Studer, Sr., Deceased, and also with plaintff Mark Studer as Wrongful Death Heir of Jon Lee Studer, Sr., Deceased, and against the defaulted defendant Western Pipe Company, fka Western Pipe & Steel Company of California, as follows:

Non-Economic Damages - $5,000,000.00.
Total - $5,000,000.00.

Furthermore, the $5,000,000.00 award is to be divided equally between plaintiffs Linda Guesman, as Successor-in-Interest to, and as Wrongful Death Heir of, Jon Lee Studer, Sr., Deceased, and Mark Studer, Scott Studer and Jon Lee Studer, Jr., as Wrongful Death Heir of Jon Lee Studer, Sr., Deceased.

Counsel for plaintiffs shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
Off Calendar Jul-27-2020 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-05-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
